headline: ₹100-300 Cr (routine capex, not at risk) — JSW Energy commissions Karnataka's first green hydrogen plant, enhancing renewable portfolio under PLI scheme
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD disclosures; no penalty exposure if compliant.
Potential for P/E premium over time; no short-term margin or revenue effect.
May unlock lower cost of capital and green financing; no immediate bond spread impact.
